sample_rationales.CDNS: CDNS swing pick · 15d hold · cascade 120.3 + theme_accel +142% in IGV. TP3 +554% to $642.78 (R:R 6.5x), stop -8.4% at $381.56. Smart money blocks + 2.4 call/put ratio support.
sample_rationales.MU: MU swing setup: Entry $1064.1 targeting $1765 (+66%) on 167.7 cascade score + 89% theme acceleration in CHAT ETF. 3.9× R:R with $277M 5d inflow; hold ~15d, stop $884.3.
sample_rationales.CRWD: CRWD swing setup · 15d hold · cascade 137.3 + CIBR theme accel +88% on $4M ETF inflow. TP3 $1110.56 (3.9× R:R, -11.4% stop). Cybersecurity demand tailwinds into earnings cycle.

sample_rationales.FTNT: FTNT swing · 15d hold · cascade 102.8 + theme_accel +88% in CIBR infrastructure play. TP3 $213.75 (3.9x R:R, -11.2% stop). Cybersecurity inflection bias vs. $61M ETF headwind.
